report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides — Solana ETF Guide 2026 and Crypto Payroll Guide 2026 — with full SEO metadata, Article + FAQ structured data, and internal linking; added both to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified Solana ETF as a high-value content gap — multiple issuers (VanEck, 21Shares, Grayscale, Canary Capital, Bitwise) filed with SEC; existing altcoin ETF guide covers the category but no dedicated Solana ETF page existed
Identified Crypto Payroll as an uncovered topic — platforms like Bitwage, Request Finance, Deel, Franklin, and Rise enable crypto salary payments; only a tangential PayFi guide existed on the site
Confirmed both topics have zero existing coverage after scanning 150+ learn pages, 111 tool pages, and all ecosystem/investing pages

Trading category (4 pages) and Compare category (8 pages) noted as thin but perps/derivatives already well-covered (14+ pages across learn/ecosystem/exchanges); pivoted to ETF and payroll gaps instead

sections.title: Content Created
items: Solana ETF Guide 2026 (230 lines) — covers what a Solana ETF is, issuer comparison table (VanEck/21Shares/Grayscale/Canary/Bitwise), approval timeline, ETF vs direct SOL purchase, staking yield advantage, regulatory risks, and who should invest

Crypto Payroll Guide 2026 (220 lines) — covers how crypto payroll works, platform comparison table (Bitwage/Request Finance/Deel/Franklin/Rise), what crypto to get paid in, tax implications, pros/cons, and employer benefits of stablecoin payroll

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Solana ETF Guide: title 'Solana ETF Guide 2026 — Spot SOL ETF Status, How to Invest | degen0x' (63 chars), target keywords: solana etf, sol etf, spot solana etf, vaneck solana etf
Crypto Payroll Guide: title 'Crypto Payroll Guide 2026 — Get Paid in Crypto | degen0x' (57 chars), target keywords: crypto payroll, get paid in bitcoin, crypto salary, bitwage
Both pages: Article JSON-LD schema + FAQ schema (5 questions each) via generateArticleSchema + generateFAQSchema
Both pages: OpenGraph article type with publishedTime, Twitter summary_large_image cards, keyword arrays
Solana ETF: 5 internal links (Bitcoin ETF Guide, Crypto ETFs Guide, Altcoin ETF Guide, Staking APY Calculator, ETF Tracker)
Crypto Payroll: 5 internal links (Taxes hub, Tax Calculator, Stablecoin Comparison, DCA Calculator, PayFi Guide)
